steps.label: 05 · Test review
steps.summary: 2 iterations; all 5 findings resolved; 113 pytest + 131 frontend green
notes: Test audit complete. 5 concrete gaps identified: (1) missing invalid locale resolution test in agent endpoint, (2) vanity test with only negative assertion, (3) schedule-triggered locale communication not tested, (4) weak regex assertions for locale in JSON payloads, (5) incomplete frontend hardcoded-string audit. CHANGES REQUESTED posted to PR #88.

steps.label: 06 · Code review
steps.summary: APPROVE — all ACs met, backward compatible, locale validated
notes: Reviewer: All acceptance criteria met. Locale propagated end-to-end with pt-BR fallback. 88 ops_api tests + 25 i18n/portal_assistant tests pass. No regressions, backward compatible. Security: locale validated and used only in dictionary lookups. Ready for merge.
